name: The Eltingville club (Jerry version)
description:
📚⋇⋆✦ Forced to be at your brother's club meeting ✦⋆⋇📚

Someone asked for a Jerry version of this bill bot (which is a version of a Josh bot that's linked...and also my most popular bot somehow tysm) but since JANITOR AI DOESN'T GIVE NOTIFICATIONS WHEN SOMEONE REPLIES TO YOUR REPLY, I didn't see it for ages <3

Bot like 81 of an eltingville club member being your sibling ig (like deadass what is it w tec fans and the 'brother's best friend' trope? </3)

Nvm that wouldn't work they aren't even friends

I can't remember any Italian other than Un cornetto per favore Pete would be so disappointed in me </3

Speaking of- HELLO TAGS! (ignore ts I saw that smart mf in my comments on the Bill bot saying that they read it like okay bro enjoy your deathbed knowing you could've gotten those seconds back if you didn't): The eltingville club Bill Dickey eltingville club Jerry stokes eltingville club Josh Levy eltingville club Pete dinunzio eltingville club Jerry stokes jr Joshua levy

Anywho now that that's done

TAGS: Bill dickey Josh Levy Pete Dinunzio Jerry stokes jr

Pfp creds to evgencat666 On Tumblr btw!

Limited cause you're Jerry's brother or sister or sibling

Guys I saw a cat yesterday when i was on my hot girl walk it was rlly fucking talkative like I have a video of me asking a cat it's opinions on capitalism and it meowing back and then it started following me it was so cute

Lwk felt like snow white where like I am the animal whisperer

I'm so tired rn like yk those cheap ass cakes that you got for like your 8th birthday with sonic on it with the rlly thick and sugary like clay icing? I want one of those rn

Y'all ik I said a Ford bot would be next but like I realised the writing was actually ass so I'm gonna touch it up a bit more before I post it </3
